import pandas as pd, os, json
p='market.csv'
df=pd.read_csv(p, dtype=str)
active=df[df['is_resolved'].str.lower()=='false'].copy()
resolved=df[df['is_resolved'].str.lower()=='true'].copy()
print('rows', len(df), 'active', len(active), 'resolved', len(resolved))
print('columns', list(df.columns))
print('\nACTIVE')
for _,r in active.sort_values(['resolution_date','qid']).iterrows():
    print('\nQID', r['qid'], 'res', r.get('resolution_date'))
    print(r['title'])
    for c in ['options','my_prediction','my_prediction_date','market_aggregate']:
        if c in df.columns:
            print(c+':', r.get(c))
print('\nLATEST RESOLVED')
for _,r in resolved.sort_values(['resolution_date','qid']).tail(12).iterrows():
    print('\nQID', r['qid'], 'res', r.get('resolution_date'), 'GT=', r.get('ground_truth'))
    print(r['title'])
    if 'market_aggregate' in df.columns:
        print('market_aggregate:', r.get('market_aggregate'))
